platform_claims_checked.claim: MCP (Model Context Protocol) is a standard way for an agent to talk to a system
before MCP, every agent-to-system connection was a custom integration. MCP turns integrations into plugs.
most modern SaaS products already ship a CLI. Stripe, GitHub, AWS, Vercel, Cloudflare, Linear, Notion.
Stripe is the archetype: you never had to use the Stripe dashboard. You could do everything from the API.
